name: watch-listing
description: Watch listing pipeline tools for Vardalux Collections

tools.name: generate_listing_pdf
tools.description: Generate a clean formatted PDF from a watch listing markdown file. Call this as the final step of every listing after listing-SKU.md has been written. Pass the absolute path to the listing folder or directly to the .md file.

folder_or_md_path.description: Absolute path to the listing folder (e.g. /path/to/Tudor/272CV-M79230B-0008/) or directly to the .md file (e.g. /path/to/listing-272CV.md)
